prompt.text:
Checking gg v0.1.0 (/Users/joe/git/daemon)
error[E0308]: mismatched types
   --> src/opencode.rs:284:42
    |
284 |             .query_row([&row.session_id, &row.part_time_created], |prompt_row| {
    |                                          ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ expected `&String`, found `&i64`
    |
    = note: expected reference `&std::string::String`
               found reference `&i64`

warning: unused variable: `session`
   --> src/status.rs:109:21
    |
109 |                     ref session,
    |                     ^^^^^^^^^^^ help: try ignoring the field: `session: _`
    |
    = note: `#[warn(unused_variables)]` (part of `#[warn(unused)]`) on by default

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0308`.
warning: `gg` (bin "gg") generated 1 warning
error: could not compile `gg` (bin "gg") due to 1 previous error; 1 warning emitted

response.text:
Fixed both issues.

- Rust type mismatch in `src/opencode.rs` by using `rusqlite::params![&row.session_id, row.part_time_created]`.
- Silenced unused variable in `src/status.rs` by ignoring `session`.

If you want, re-run `cargo check` now.

meta.session_title: Plan for a Git-based autonomous CLI daemon with commit automation
